Home / Service Areas / Annapolis

Remodeling contractor in Annapolis, MD

Trusted local professionals serving Annapolis and surrounding communities

Serving Annapolis, MD

Consider It Done Construction Co. LLC is proud to offer expert remodeling services in Annapolis, Maryland. Known for its historic downtown featuring Colonial and Federal-style homes, Annapolis presents unique opportunities and challenges for renovation projects. We specialize in preserving the historical integrity of Annapolis homes while incorporating modern amenities and design.

Our team is experienced in navigating the regulations and guidelines associated with historic preservation in Annapolis, ensuring that all remodeling projects are compliant and sensitive to the city's unique character. Annapolis experiences hot, humid summers, so energy-efficient upgrades are especially important.
